summary: Tested VitalSense AI with new Multimodal Monitoring, Baseline Vitals, and Predictive Deterioration features. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend has login form issue but dashboard accessible.

backend_issues.notes: All new feature APIs working correctly. 22/25 tests passed (3 expected failures for user already registered)

ui_bugs.issue: Sign In button click doesn't submit form - only Enter key works
ui_bugs.impact: Users must press Enter to login instead of clicking button

passed_tests: Backend API: Multimodal CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE operations
Backend API: Baseline CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE operations
Enhanced risk calculation with baseline deviation
Patient detail endpoint includes multimodal and baseline data
Frontend: Dashboard loads and displays 4 patients with live vitals
Frontend: Tab structure includes all required tabs (Vital Charts, Multimodal Data, Baseline, Patient Info)

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (login works with Enter key, dashboard loads, but navigation issues)

critical_fixes_needed.issue: Login form Sign In button not working
critical_fixes_needed.description: The Sign In button click event doesn't submit the form. Only Enter key submission works. This affects user experience.

medium_priority_fixes.description: Session seems to reset during page navigation, preventing proper testing of patient detail pages

action_item_for_main_agent.testing_notes: All new Multimodal and Baseline backend features are fully functional. Frontend new features couldn't be fully tested due to navigation issues, but tab structure is present.
